title: Loyalty Membership
description: Loyalty membership that the business offers or associated with.

member_id.description: User's loyalty membership ID (e.g. loyalty card #, membership #).

name.description: Business specific name of the loyalty membership/program.

tiers.description: List of tiers associated with the loyalty membership.

activated_tiers.description: List of tiers that the customer is activated for or wish to activate, identified by the `id` of the Membership Tier object.

rewards.description: List of quantifiable rewards value the user holds. Each object encapsulates one type of reward the membership offers.

provisional.description: True if this membership requires additional verification.

eligibility.description: The eligibility claim accepted by the Business for this membership. Corresponds to a value from context.eligibility.
